entry.name: icon
entry.label: Icon name for the compact representation.

entry.name: toolTipSubText
entry.label: Tooltip description text.
entry.default: Shortcuts for shutdown, reboot, logout, settings etc.

entry.name: menuItems
entry.label: JSON array of menu items.
entry.default: [{"type":"item","name":"About This Computer","command":"kinfocenter"},{"type":"divider"},{"type":"item","name":"System Settings...","command":"systemsettings"},{"type":"item","name":"App Store...","command":"plasma-discover"},{"type":"divider"},{"type":"item","name":"Force Quit...","command":"qdbus6 org.kde.KWin /KWin slotKillWindow || xkill"},{"type":"divider"},{"type":"item","name":"Sleep","command":"qdbus6 org.freedesktop.PowerManagement /org/freedesktop/PowerManagement Suspend"},{"type":"item","name":"Restart...","command":"qdbus6 org.kde.Shutdown /Shutdown logoutAndReboot"},{"type":"item","name":"Shut Down...","command":"qdbus6 org.kde.Shutdown /Shutdown logoutAndShutdown"},{"type":"divider"},{"type":"item","name":"Lock Screen","command":"qdbus6 org.freedesktop.ScreenSaver /ScreenSaver Lock","shortcut":"⌃⌘Q"},{"type":"item","name":"Log Out...","command":"qdbus6 org.kde.Shutdown /Shutdown logout","shortcut":"⇧⌘Q"}]
